    Index

    A B C D G I K L M N O P R S T V X Y Z 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    R

    r - Variable in Klasse raytracer.Color
     
    radius - Variable in Klasse raytracer.Sphere
     
    Ray - Klasse in raytracer
    Represents a ray in 3D-space.
    Ray(Vector3d, Vector3d) - Konstruktor für Klasse raytracer.Ray
    Creates a new ray with an origin and a direction.
    raytracer - Package raytracer
     
    Raytracer - Klasse in raytracer
    The main class for setting up the scene and controlling the raytracing.
    Raytracer() - Konstruktor für Klasse raytracer.Raytracer
    Initializes the raytracer and sets up the scene with the camera, light and objects.
    reflect(Vector3d) - Methode in Klasse raytracer.Vector3d
    Reflects a vector by the normal vector.
    refract(Vector3d, double) - Methode in Klasse raytracer.Vector3d
    Refracts a vector at a given normal with a given refractive index.
    refractiveIndex - Variable in Klasse raytracer.RefractiveMaterial
     
    RefractiveMaterial - Klasse in raytracer
    Represents a refractive material that extends the base material.
    RefractiveMaterial(Color, double, double, double, double) - Konstruktor für Klasse raytracer.RefractiveMaterial
    Creates a new refractive material.
    repeatU - Variable in Klasse raytracer.CheckeredMaterial
     
    repeatV - Variable in Klasse raytracer.CheckeredMaterial
